acceptance_criteria: Decision recorded on whether to keep random_word_id as-is vs replace; if replace, identify target module and dependency impact.
description: Decide whether to keep bstd::random_word_id and if we can slim its deps (rand) or migrate functionality into dsrs-specific utilities.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Code pointers (as of 2026-01-27):
- `random_word_id` implementation: `vendor/baml/crates/bstd/src/random_word_id.rs` (re-exported in `vendor/baml/crates/bstd/src/lib.rs`).
- No usages found under `crates/` via `rg -n "random_word_id" crates`.
Investigation: confirm whether any dependency pulls `bstd` into the public API (check `Cargo.toml`/`Cargo.lock`), and decide if we should re-export, vendor, or remove.

title: Assess random_word_id usage + deps for dsrs
